intro: Gongronemopsis tenacissima, also known as Chinese dragon's blood, is a plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It is valued for its purported health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Gongronemopsis tenacissima include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
